[![Pacific Smilekrafters](https://offsiteschedule.zocdoc.com/images/remote/zd_bookonline_162x48.png?type=bobhtml&monolith_provider_id=108118&practice_id=pt_Mitu-cZMPUqayxeH-QJOhx)](https://www.zocdoc.com/practice/pacific-smilekrafters-108118?lock=true&isNewPatient=false&referrerType=widget "Pacific Smilekrafters")

## BEAUTIFUL SMILES, STATE OF THE ART TECHNOLOGY PACIFIC BEACH, CA

## Best Rated Dentist in Pacific Beach, San Diego.

At Pacific SmileKrafters, we treat you like Family! We never lose the sight of the fact that we are here to help you smile by providing personalized, compassionate care. We understand that having a healthy smile helps improve your overall well-being. Starting from welcoming you to our office to investing in the latest dental technology we want to give you the best possible experience

[Know More](https://pacificsmilekrafters.com/index.php/about-us/)

## Our Services

Preferred Invisalign® Dentist in Pacific Beach.

Implant surgeries & restorations.

Prosthodontics: Customized Dentures, crowns and bridges

Advanced cosmetic dental care using customized veeners & crowns

Pediatric Dentistry: Dentistry for kids.

Stress-Free Sedation Dentistry

Teeth-In-A-Day using full arch implants.

Endodontics: Root canal therapy.

Treatment for cracked or chipped teeth

Express denture relines & repairs.

## Team Pacific SmileKrafters

![](https://pacificsmilekrafters.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Avni_01-819x1024.jpg)

## Dr. Avani Parmar

## Meet Dr. Avani Parmar

**MY DENTAL EDUCATION AND COMMITMENT TO CONTINUING EDUCATION**

Dr. Parmar completed her Prosthodontics and AEGD Preceptorship Program from the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) and is a graduate from the Rutgers School of Dental Medicine (RSDM) with her Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD). In addition, she has also graduated from an esteemed Dental University in India where she spent years treating the unprivileged society. Dr. Parmar is a member of the American Dental Association and the California Dental Association. She has dedicated her career passionately practicing family dentistry including Invisalign, endodontics, implant restorations and cosmetic dentistry in India, Pennsylvania and now in California.

As a child, Dr. Parmar experienced some congenital tooth abnormalities and knows firsthand how dental concerns can affect confidence. She enjoys the experience of being able to provide instant gratification with a healthy, beautiful smile. Dr. Parmar is certified in Invisalign and in Six Months Smile for addressing orthodontic concerns.

**OUTSIDE OUR PACIFIC BEACH DENTAL OFFICE**

Dr. Parmar loves spending time with her husband Dr. Nirmal Shah and their son, Vihaan. She also has one four-legged daughter and her name is Bella. She enjoys travelling, hiking and cycling

## Meet Dr. Nirmal Shah

**MY DENTAL EDUCATION AND COMMITMENT TO CONTINUING EDUCATION**

Dr. Nirmal Shah is an Epidemiologist as well as a General Dentist. He obtained his Masters in Public Health (MPH) degree from Emory University, Atlanta, GA and is also a graduate from the University of Colorado where he attained his Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) degree. In addition, he also graduated from an acclaimed Dental School in India and has served several years both in India and USA to provide care for the unprivileged community before moving with his family to California. Dr. Shah is a member of the American Dental Association, California Dental Association and San Diego Dental Society.

Possessing a jovial nature and pleasant demeanor, Dr. Shah is equipped to deliver artistic and quality dental care. His minute attention to detail and a panoramic view of patients needs allows him to effective devise a long-lasting cosmetic treatment plan encompassing all aspects of dentistry. He keeps himself abreast with all the recent advances like Teeth-In-A-Day, Implants, Veneers and Full Mouth Reconstruction. You will find him presenting patients multiple treatment options with cost and outcome comparisons so the patient will be empowered to decide what best treatment suites their needs.

Considering his outgoing personality, Dr. Shah is comfortable with individuals from diverse backgrounds. He would probably be a counselor, if not a dentist, considering his unique skill of listening to others and helping them with their problems.

Dr. Shah has also acquired his fellowship at Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) at the office of Smoking and Oral Health. He research interest includes Secondhand Smoke Exposure and Cigarette Smoking Among Adults and its effect on oral health.

**OUTSIDE OUR PACIFIC BEACH DENTAL OFFICE**

In his free time, he enjoys spending time with his wife, son and dog ‘Bella’. His other interests include reading and trying out different cuisines.

![](https://pacificsmilekrafters.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Dr_Nirmal-819x1024.jpg)

## Dr. Nirmal Shah

## Why Should I Trust Pacific SmileKrafters?

Recognized as Best Dentists in Pacific Beach and Chula Vista, CA

Our state of the art dental office with experienced, qualified and compassionate dentist make Pacific SmileKrafters the best family dentist in Pacific Beach and La Jolla, CA

All round comprehensive general dental practice

We provide holistic comprehensive services, creating a long lasting relationship with the whole family as their family dentists.

A warm welcoming, family-like environment

Thought of visiting a dentist can trigger nervousness, we take care of your experience and treat you with utmost care and patience just like a caring family would do.

State-of-the-art dental technology

We may be traditional in family values by taking good care of you, but we do not compromise on technology, we have the latest and the best technology to serve your dental needs.

Unparalleled customer service

We take care of your experience with us, from the time you call to take an appointment to the time you get out from the clinic. We want to make sure you have a seamless customer experience.

We treat generations of members within the same family

We are the one stop shop for all your family members treating you like our own, taking care of every member individually from all age groups.

Renowned dentists

Dr. Avani Parmar and Dr. Nirmal Shah – wife – husband duo are well renowned dentist in San Diego,CA.

## Testimonials

Dr. Parmar and Jenny are absolutely amazing. I hadn’t been to the dentist in 5 years and they have taken such great care of me and my teeth. I truly enjoy my time with them every time I’m in their chair. I cannot recommend Dr. Parmar enough!

JANE GATES

Dr Parmar is truly incredible at what she does. As someone with dental trauma and a fear of the dentist she was so informative and gentle- truly an expert in her craft! And the dental hygienist Jenny is an absolute gem. Definitely recommend coming here for your dental needs 🙂

Melanie Luster

Dr. Parmar is awesome! I was very nervous about the cleaning procedure but she did an awesome job. I was very happy with the results and would definitely recommend!

Ellen Riceman

I've had the pleasure to work alongside Dr. Shah as his financial coordinator for many years. I must say I've never come across such a caring dentist with incredible bedside manors. He is such a perfectionist and such an honest person. He always goes out his way and with what he believes benefits his patients by any means necessary. If you want great quality dental work and a doctor who will make sure your dental needs are taken care of without any doubt, he is the one! He is definitely a dentist you'd want to go to until he grows old promise!

Deysy Marin

Dr Parmar is very professional and uses advanced dental technology to lessen patient discomfort. Personable and provides a comfortable environment in this small cozy office in PB. Works well with the insurance nuances too. Recommend.

Matt M

Very good dental work. Patient comfort is appreciated. Virtually pain free dentistry.
I just finished deep cleaning appointment. Vital to g
um and tooth health. With age folks have bone loss but Dr. Pamar has turned that around. At 71 I'm proud to save my teeth. No implants, but some excellent crowns.

TONY GRECO

Very good dental work. Patient comfort is appreciated. Virtually pain free dentistry.
I just finished deep cleaning appointment. Vital to gum and tooth health. With age folks have bone loss but Dr. Pamar has turned that around. At 71 I'm proud to save my teeth. No implants, but some excellent crowns.

Deborah Marlor

Dr Parmar and Jenny were really great! I had a really bad toothache and called the office and Dr Parmar got me in an hour later, turns out I had to get a root canal. Both Dr Parmar and Jenny were really friendly and put me at ease with the process. I get nervous to go to the Dentist’s, but my experience with Dr Parmar and Jenny was great. I’ll keep coming here.

Chekwube Ukeme-Owoh

Both Dr’s Shah and Dr Parmar are highly professional and extremely proficient.
I’ve had multiple cleanings and at least two crowns set by this team and they were all painless and quick.
The atmosphere is friendly and fun.
Thank you for taking such good care of my family.

Glen Wheeler

I was a patient of the dentist previou sly at this location and happy with him for many years. Dr Parmer and Jenne have take on his patients and l saw her today for the first time. She was so accommodating and understood my problem right away. Her experience matches her honesty and professional manners. Her fees and explanations are very reasonable for her skills. I felt very confortable in her hands. KAZUKO

kazuko bednay

metadata.title: Pacific Smile Krafters

data.summary: Pacific SmileKrafters is a dental practice located in Pacific Beach, California, focusing on providing compassionate and personalized care to families. They offer a variety of dental services, including routine exams, cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, Invisalign, pediatric dentistry, and more. The practice prides itself on using state-of-the-art technology to enhance patient experiences. Dr. Avani Parmar and Dr. Nirmal Shah lead the team, both possessing extensive qualifications and a commitment to patient care. The office environment is described as warm and welcoming, emphasizing customer service and comfort. Testimonials from patients highlight the gentle approach and skill of the dentists, as well as the supportive atmosphere created by the staff.
